# grāmatr for Claude Code

Real-time intelligent context engineering layer that sits between you and every AI tool you use.

Every prompt is pre-classified and loaded with an intelligence contract — behavioral directives, quality criteria, and relevant context from past work — before the model responds. Three measurable wins:

- **~2,700 tokens** delivered as input context per request, displacing the reasoning Claude would otherwise generate as expensive output tokens
- **System-prompt collapse** — structured contract replaces tens of thousands of tokens of behavioral enforcement
- **Semantic retrieval** — past decisions, preferences, and project state pulled in automatically

Plus: consistent, auditable AI behavior across every session, every tool, every team member.

## Install

```
/plugin marketplace add gramatr/claude-plugin
/plugin install gramatr@gramatr-claude-plugin
```

OAuth is handled automatically by Claude Code's connector flow.

## Learn more

https://gramatr.com
